economic_notes: Kisemattawa Pimukamik Gas Bar is a consolidated band-owned enterprise. WTP and Water Main Distribution Upgrade Project ongoing at $14.4M. Multiple housing construction projects in progress including 10-unit project and 2020/2021 housing project.
notes: Audit is a Disclaimer of Opinion due to significant internal control weaknesses across cash, accounts receivable, inventory, prepaid expenses, tangible capital assets, construction in progress, accounts payable, contingencies, payroll, revenue and expenditures. No schedule of remuneration provided. Housing Authority segment shows a massive deficit of $14.09M in 2022 vs $1.81M in 2021, likely due to large construction activity recorded as expense. Accounts payable of $38.1M is very high relative to revenue. Soil remediation restricted cash of $9.46M held by PM Associates. Fiscal year 2022 not 2024 - document is for year ended March 31, 2022.
